title: Mission to the Astro-Orange Restaurant
summary: Captain Izzy leads a daring space mission originally destined for the Astro-Mar-Orange Astro Restaurant. Accompanied by her crew, Kenzi and Lieutenant Finncat, the journey takes an unexpected turn when the ship must pull over for emergency repairs to its tables, walls, and floors. Using specialized tools like the center-comp-ul-tree and an art-per-puller, the crew restores the ship to full functionality. While the destination shifts toward Nana’s house, the crew stays entertained with mechanical 'play books' and a watchful robot camera. The mission finally concludes as the crew transitions from the stars back to Earth for music class and a visit to Ttia's house.

highlightQuote.text: And we're going to... a blast-off's going to be in an astro... astro-mar-orange astro restaurant. This restaurant is near Silver Street school.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Put your space suit on and go.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, here's my space suit.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Everyone else has their space suit on. Even Kenzi.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, Kenzi's coming too, okay.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah, Kenzi is already wearing her space suit.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: All right, Captain Izzy, you're the captain of our spaceship. We're getting ready for our space mission.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And we're going to... a blast-off's going to be in an astro... astro-mar-orange astro restaurant. This restaurant is near Silver Street school.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, we're going on a space mission to a restaurant.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, Finncat, are you coming on the space mission too?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Dadda, this could maybe be a... pull-over something, see? It pulls us over, we pull over.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, where are we now? We pulled over our spaceship.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah, because this is the space went and I have to go the door and always Finn's gonna flop on the space chair.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, what was that sound?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: That was our... that was... the spaceship needs fixing.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh my gosh, Finncat, we have to fix the spaceship. What's broken on our spaceship, Captain Izzy?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Oh, but no. I just heard that sound when I was sleeping, and the table and the wall and the floor and the table and some other stuff in our ship is broken.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh my gosh, how do we fix it, Captain Izzy?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Well, maybe we get out of our ship and take a look around. I'll get our center-comp-ul-tree.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: This will be watching us.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Dad, fix fix. I fixed everything.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: The art-per-puller... this is a per-puller... and a map for us. It's just going right there.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: All right, we're back in our ship and everything is all fixed. Good work, Captain Izzy. Let's continue.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Well, this makes the space noises. See like that.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: A special like camera is gonna watch us to make sure we're okay. There, our robot camera is watching us.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Are we almost there, Captain Izzy?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, we're not. I think we're going to go there some... another time. Maybe we're going to Nana's house.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, now we're on our way to Nana's.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I bought this new book. No, we don't read that book. It's for playing. It's a play book.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I'm just adjusting the commissions inside of our rocket.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Captain Iz, pretty soon it's time to get ready to go to Ttia's house.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Oh Dad, maybe we might have to hurry up and move our school. I think we're done with our space mission time.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And now it's time for singing time. Dad, get your ukulele. I'll get the tambourine.

characters.name: Captain Izzy
characters.description: A determined space explorer and brilliant researcher, this confident commander leads her mission into the stars with absolute authority. A master pilot of both spacecraft and deep-sea submersibles, she navigates glittering heavens and crushing depths with unerring precision. Her tireless quest to collect alien artifacts remains fueled by a singular, inquisitive goal: finding playmates across the universe.

characters.name: Kenzi
characters.description: A crew member who is already suited up and ready for the space flight.

characters.name: Finncat
characters.description: A feline space lieutenant with a penchant for flopping into the captain’s chair or onto a warm lap, he is currently found haunting the galley with a busy air, far too preoccupied with the kitchen's business to indulge in his usual repertoire of snuggles.

characters.name: Nana
characters.description: The dignified mole matriarch and grandmother to Hattie, Pistis, and Isabella, this pillar of watchful wisdom resides at the end of the train line, tackling life’s problems "one at a time." From engineering mouse-scale Lego structures to the meticulous restoration of dollhouses using patient glue and tiny pencils, her steady paws bridge the gap between architectural feats and delicate artistry. Whether discerning potential as a trolley passenger or welcoming weary travelers into her sanctuary, her quiet authority is so legendary that she graces the cover of Hattie’s book in a rare, peaceful slumber. Even in rest, she remains the heart of their world—a steady warmth anchoring every journey’s end, her sharp eyes softening for Izzy’s mushroom-textured crafts.

characters.name: Ttia
characters.description: The person the crew plans to visit after the space mission concludes.

characters.name: Robot Camera
characters.description: A specialized device tasked with watching over the crew to ensure their safety.

places.name: Spaceship
places.description: The crew’s primary vessel centers on a command bridge where ergonomic chairs face a panoramic window and a console projecting a specialized space map. Integrated sound machines provide auditory depth to the mission’s operations, echoing through a sleek interior lined with high-tech books. Outfitted with a dexterous robot arm for harvesting geological specimens and a reinforced storage bay for space rocks, the craft serves as both a high-tech laboratory and a long-term home, seamlessly blending the grit of deep-space exploration with a sanctuary for advanced scholarship.

places.name: Astro-Mar-Orange Astro Restaurant
places.description: The original destination of the space mission, located near Silver Street school.

places.name: Silver Street school
places.description: A landmark located near the mission's destination restaurant.

places.name: Nana's House
places.description: A beautiful house with a smoking chimney marks the end of a long, wooded driveway, serving as the crew’s secondary destination as they navigate the vastness of the stars.

places.name: Ttia's House
places.description: The final Earth-bound destination once the mission is finished.
